resources.title: Gmail 수신 → AI 분류 → Notion 저장 자동화
resources.description: Zapier에서 Gmail 새 이메일 트리거 → ChatGPT로 중요도/카테고리 분류 → Notion 데이터베이스에 저장하는 Zap 구성
resources.command: Zapier → New Zap → Gmail(Trigger: New Email) → OpenAI(분류 프롬프트) → Notion(Create Page)

resources.title: 구글 폼 응답 → AI 분석 → 슬랙 알림
resources.description: 고객 피드백 폼 응답이 들어오면 AI가 감정분석·우선순위를 판단하고 슬랙 채널에 요약 알림을 보내는 자동화
resources.command: Zapier → Google Forms(Trigger) → OpenAI(감정분석) → Slack(Send Message)

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of integrating AI with tools like Zapier, Make, and n8n?
options: To create manual workflows for data processing
To automate email, social media, and data processing tasks
To increase the complexity of automation tasks
To eliminate the use of APIs in automation
quiz.explanation: The primary purpose is to automate tasks such as email, social media, and data processing, making workflows more efficient.

quiz.question: In a Zapier automation, what is the role of ChatGPT when integrated with Gmail?
options: To send emails directly to users
To categorize and prioritize emails based on their content
quiz.explanation: ChatGPT is used to categorize and prioritize emails based on their content, enhancing the workflow efficiency.

quiz.question: What does the n8n AI/LangChain node guide primarily assist users with?
options: Integrating AI functionalities into automation workflows
quiz.explanation: The n8n AI/LangChain node guide assists users in integrating AI functionalities into their automation workflows.

practicePrompts.label: Zapier Email Automation
practicePrompts.instruction: Set up an automation to categorize emails using AI.
practicePrompts.prompt: Create a Zap that triggers on new Gmail emails, sends the content to ChatGPT for categorization, and saves the result to a Notion database.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a filter to only process emails from a specific sender.

practicePrompts.label: Feedback Analysis Automation
practicePrompts.instruction: Automate customer feedback analysis and notifications.
practicePrompts.prompt: Design an automation that triggers when a new response is submitted to a feedback form, analyzes sentiment with AI, and sends a summary alert to a Slack channel.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with different sentiment analysis models to see how results vary.

practicePrompts.label: n8n AI Workflow
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a workflow using n8n to process data.
practicePrompts.prompt: Build an n8n workflow that retrieves data from an API, processes it with an AI node, and outputs the results to a Google Sheets document.
practicePrompts.followUp: Add a condition to filter the data before sending it to Google Sheets.
